name: meta-workflow
description: Toolkit for authoring and improving Claude Code assets. The retro skill runs an offline retrospective over your past sessions, distilling recurring friction into durable fixes (memories, CLAUDE.md rules, hooks). The memory-maintenance skill triages your existing auto-memory corpus — per note deciding keep / migrate to a versioned file / delete / merge — and reconciles the index, never committing. Complements dev-workflow, which targets application code; this one targets the Claude Code tooling itself.
